messages.content:
A male anthropomorphic muscular jaguar is swimming in a lake and enjoying that sunny day. He has a masculine head with strong squarish maw and his fur is a brilliant reddish-yellow with spots forming large rosettes which several dots inside of them and they stretched and undulated under any flex or ripple of his beefy muscles.
But suddenly tremors shake the ground and start to cause bigger waves on the surface of the lake, the brawny jaguar can still swim correctly but soon he sees at his surprise and horror an humongous form dwarfing the trees of the forest bordering the shore of the lake. The gigantic creature is of equine nature, a stallion looking like a very muscular and beefy draft horse. His coat is dapple grey and his mane white. Another earth shaking step of the colossal equine smashes a tree to splinter under the boulder sized hoof of his front leg. He looks around with a placid gaze on his eyes and then lowers his enormous equine head toward some of the trees. His horse’ lips opens and closes around the crowns of some trees and with sharp noises of broken wood he chews them as if they were mere blade of grass.
Then, after that little snack, he slowly moves forward, his hooves crashing through the surface of the water with thunderous splashings and getting in deeper water his belly and muscular shoulder brutally enter the lake. The jaguar struggles against the waves and swirls caused by the hundred of tons of immense equine body as it is making the water more agitated than any tempest the lake could have known. But the stallion doesn’t notice the tiny jaguar trashing in the water yet and simply enjoys his bath, his horse tail swaying nonchalantly.
Getting submerse several meters deep at several times by the brutal swirls and waves caused by the mere movement of the gigantic herbivore the jaguar is helplessly struggling, his powerful and brawny muscles being no match against the heavy turbulence caused by any of the casual movements of the massive meaty beast.
But, as he is looking around peacefully, the colossal draft horse notices the frantic movement of the creature, diminutive in comparison of his looming and massively powerful form.
The jaguar roars in total fear as he sees the humongous titan looming head turning in his precise direction and one of his huge eyes staring at him he struggles against the still incredibly turbulent water. He attempts to swim away his strong muscles doing their best to make him reach the more distance he can from the proximity with that colossus. But the giant horse only lowers his head, casting a shadow on the surface of the water. The jaguar can feel the hot air gushing from the gaping nostrils of the massive equine ad glancing above his beefy shoulder he roars again as he see a giant equine mouth opening and revealing enormous incisors. His thick greyish horse lips ready to close.
The humongous draft horse seizes the diminutive predator between his lips as delicately his immense form can and brings him closer from his looming body before loosening the clutch of his lips and letting the brilliantly colored big cat plummeting in the water again. His roars of terror sounding amusingly feeble at his ears. He observed that second attempt of the jaguar to flee away with his frantic swim before catching him again the same way another time. The gigantic creature being visibly amused by this little game.
He then finds some other way to have fun with this improvised tiny bath toy. He plunged his lips in the water just behind the panicked feline and starts to drink thousands of gallons with each mouthfuls the suction dragging the jaguar backward despite his desperate attempts to distance his tormentor. And the horse sucks the way smaller jaguar in his mouth. He could feel the diminutive muscular predator wiggling and trashing delightfully between his tongue and palate and, feeling playful, he rolls his beefy yet tiny body under his huge tongue with enough attention to avoid to get him crushed under the pressure.
Then he releases his plaything and lets a saliva coated big cat drop in the water. The pleased giant horse watched his tiny toy with amusement. He is so fun to play with, and it has been so long he doesn’t have such entertainment and he doesn’t have had enough yet. He decides to keep the jaguar with him to plat again.

The jaguar, on the other hand, is terrified and exhausted. He tries to swim away again, but his muscles are fatigued, and the water is still rough from the gigantic horse's movements. He can feel the heavy paws of the equine following him, and soon he is once again scooped up in the massive jaws of the stallion.

This time, however, the horse decides to take his plaything with him to the shore. He walks towards the jagged rocks, still holding the jaguar comfortably in his mouth, and deposits him on the ground. The jaguar, completely drenched and shaken, tries to stand, but his legs give out, and he falls back on the ground.

The gigantic equine looks at him for a moment before walking away. The jaguar watches him disappear into the distance, still trying to catch his breath and make sense of what just happened. He realizes that he owes his life to the massive horse. If it hadn't been for the equine's gentle grip, he would have drowned or been crushed.

As he lies there, panting and trying to calm his racing heart, the jaguar wonders if he will ever see the gigantic stallion again. He hopes not, as he doesn't think his tiny heart could handle another encounter like that. But at the same time, there's a small part of him that's grateful for the unique experience and the lesson it taught him about the true definition of power.
Next morning the jaguar hears the booming steps of the gigantic hoofed creature approaching again.

The jaguar's heart races as he recognizes the sound of the colossal equine approaching. Memories of the previous day's terror flood back to him, but he tries to stay calm and prepare for whatever is coming.

As the horse emerges from the thick forest, the jaguar can't believe his eyes. The massive equine is bearing a gift in his massive jaws. It's a large fish, still wriggling and fresh, that he gently places at the jaguar's feet.

The jaguar looks up in shock and confusion, but the horse only nods his head and walks away, his enormous strides shaking the ground beneath him.

The jaguar watches as the horse's massive form disappears into the distance. He can't believe what just happened - an apex predator and a gentle giant sharing a moment of kindness. He's not sure what to make of it, but he decides to accept the gift and enjoy his meal.

With his belly full, the jaguar feels a sense of peace and gratitude. He realizes that not all animals are territorial or aggressive, and that sometimes, even the mightiest of creatures can show an unexpected side of themselves.

From that day on, the jaguar keeps an eye out for the gigantic equine, always wondering if he'll see him again, and if so, what other surprises he might have in store.

One day, while he is moving in the forest the jaguar reaches a clearing an stops, frozen by surprise. He sees the towering and immense form of the colossal draft horse. This time he is lucky, the horse doesn't have spotted him as he is turned on the other side.  The jaguar looks in amazement at the gigantic and looming form, the massive hooves of his hind legs and the humongous and powerful muscles of his looming thighs and rump and the several tenths feet long tail, without mentioning the enormous size of his private parts.
As the jaguar is absorbed by his contemplation of the almighty beast he doesn't notice the horse turned his head to look behind ans has spotted him. He snorted playfully at the sight of his favorite plaything being so close and the jaguar startled ludicrously at the gigantic eyes that are observing him.

The jaguar freezes, unsure whether to run or stay put. He remembers the previous encounters with the colossal horse, which started out terrifying but then had become almost playful. He decides to wait and see what the gigantic creature will do.

The colossal horse takes a step forward, his massive hoof shaking the ground, and the jaguar cowers, fearing the worst. But then the horse lowers his head and extends his massive snout towards the jaguar, almost as if he's inviting him to come closer.

The jaguar is hesitant at first but then decides to approach the horse. He walks forward tentatively, expecting to be scooped up in the horse's jaws at any moment. But the horse only sniffs at him curiously, and then whinnies softly.

The jaguar is surprised by the softness of the sound, so different from the booming steps of the horse. For the first time, he realizes that there's more to this creature than just brute strength and power.

The horse reaches down with his massive snout, and the jaguar hesitates for a moment before nuzzling against the soft fur of the equine's nose. It's an unexpected moment of tenderness between two unlikely creatures, and the jaguar feels a sense of awe and wonder.

As the sun sets and the forest grows dark, the horse turns and walks away, his massive form disappearing into the horizon. The jaguar watches him go, knowing that he'll never forget this moment of tranquility and connection with one of the most powerful creatures on the planet.

The horse finds the jaguar another time, after a short pursuit, he catches the way smaller "big" cat between his lips and puts him carefully on the top of a very tall tree (which doesn't reach more than the height of the withers of the horse). Then the horse closely examing the jaguar as he is clinging on his perch and then starts to lick his handsome muscular body.

The jaguar is taken aback, not sure how to react as the massive tongue of the horse darts across his fur. He tries to scramble away but finds himself stuck on the tree, unable to move.

As the horse continues to lick him, the jaguar starts to relax, realizing that this is yet another unexpected moment of tenderness between these two unlikely friends. He closes his eyes and lets out a soft purr as the horse's tongue darts across his belly and chest.

The horse seems to be enjoying himself as well, his tongue lapping at the jaguar's form with playful enthusiasm. The jaguar giggles as the horse's whiskers tickle him, unable to resist the sensation of closeness and affection that these two predators are sharing.

As the sun sets in the sky, and the stars begin to twinkle above, the horse finally backs away, giving the jaguar a chance to climb down from the tree. The jaguar looks up at the horse and gives a soft purr of thanks, recognizing that he's just experienced yet another magical moment in his strange friendship with this massive equine.

And as the horse disappears into the night, the jaguar feels a sense of peace and contentment, knowing that even though there are differences between all creatures, sometimes there can be moments of unity and joy as well.
Next day, the horse decided to keep the jaguar between his lips when he moved away at the sunset.

The jaguar is surprised when the horse scoops him up in his massive jaws, his powerful muscles clenching around the tiny predator. He feels the wind rushing past him as the horse takes off, his heart racing with a mixture of excitement and fear.

But as they continue to move through the forest, the jaguar starts to relax. He realizes that he's safe between the massive hooves of the horse, in a place where no other predator would dare to approach.

He closes his eyes and leans into the soft fur of the horse's mouth, feeling surprisingly comfortable in this unusual position. The horse seems to sense his relaxation, his soft whinnies a gentle reminder that they're in this together.

As they move faster and faster, the jaguar suddenly feels a rush of adrenaline, his body tingling with the thrill of the ride. He can feel the power of the horse's muscles beneath him, their movements perfectly synchronized as they travel through the forest.

And then, as the sun dips below the horizon, the horse comes to a stop, his massive form casting a shadow over the jaguar.

The jaguar looks up at him, feeling almost disappointed that the ride is over, but also grateful for the unique experience. He nuzzles against the soft fur of the horse's snout, trying to convey his thanks for the ride.

The horse seems to understand, giving a soft whinny and turning to leave. The jaguar watches him go, feeling a sense of awe and respect for this mighty creature. He's not sure what the future holds for their strange friendship but he knows that no matter what, he'll always be grateful for these moments of connection and joy.
Where does the horse go for the night ?

The horse disappears into the forest, his massive form soon blending in with the shadows and foliage. The jaguar watches him go, feeling a sense of emptiness, but also excitement for the next time they'll meet.

As the night settles in, the jaguar starts to hunt for his own prey, his powerful muscles carrying him through the dark and dense underbrush. He's not afraid of the other predators in the forest, not after he's witnessed the true power of the mighty horse.

Hours pass, and the jaguar finally finds a small stream. He drinks from the cool water, feeling refreshed and rejuvenated. He sees the glimmer of fish in the water, and decides to catch himself a meal before calling it a night.

As he stalks along the bank, claws poised for the strike, he can't help but think of the horse, wondering where he's gone and what he's doing. But he knows one thing for sure - whenever they meet again, there will always be a sense of awe and wonder between them, a shared understanding of the true majesty and power that exists in the natural world.

As the jaguar catches his fish and enjoys his meal, he can't help but feel a sense of gratitude and appreciation for the horse. It's not often that two predators can develop such a unique and unexpected friendship, but he realizes that it's precisely these moments of connection that make life so magical and special.

With a contented purr, the jaguar settles in for the night, feeling safe and secure in the knowledge that the mighty horse is somewhere out there, watching over him with a powerful but gentle gaze. And as he drifts off to sleep, he dreams of more adventures and unexpected moments of tenderness with his unlikely friend.

The next morning, the jaguar wakes up feeling refreshed and energized. He stretches his powerful muscles before setting off through the forest, his senses alert for any sign of the massive horse.

As he moves through the trees, he hears the booming sound of hooves in the distance, and his heart starts to race with excitement. Could it be the horse?

He starts to move faster, his lithe body gliding through the foliage with effortless grace. And then, just ahead, he catches a glimpse of the massive equine, his height towering above the trees.

The jaguar can't help but marvel at the sheer power and size of the horse as he approaches. But then, to his surprise, he sees the horse's massive head lowered to the ground, and realizes that he's grazing on the foliage.

The jaguar approaches cautiously, not wanting to startle the horse. But then, something catches his eye - a snake, coiling around a branch just ahead. The jaguar realizes that the snake is dangerous, and could harm the horse if he's not careful.

With a flurry of movement, the jaguar pounces, his claws digging into the bark of the tree as he snatches the snake in his powerful jaws. He carries it back to the horse, dropping it at the massive equine's hooves.

The horse looks up at him, his massive eyes expressing a mix of surprise and gratitude. The jaguar feels a sense of pride, knowing that he's helped protect his friend from harm.

As the day wears on, the horse and jaguar spend hours together, wandering through the forest and sharing moments of quiet companionship. And the jaguar realizes that even in the world of predators, there's always room for empathy, understanding, and even friendship.

As the sun starts to set, the jaguar knows that it's time for him to say goodbye to his equine friend. He looks up at the massive horse, feeling a sense of sadness that their time together is coming to an end.

But then, to his surprise, the horse dips his massive head, nuzzling against the jaguar's muscular form with an unexpected tenderness. The jaguar can't help but purr with delight, feeling a sense of warmth and connection with the mighty equine.

As the horse starts to move away, the jaguar watches him go, feeling a sense of gratitude for their time together and a renewed sense of wonder at the magic and beauty of the natural world.

And as he strides through the forest, his powerful muscles flexing with each movement, the jaguar knows that he'll carry the memory of his time with the horse with him always, a reminder of the true power and majesty of the world around him, and the surprising moments of connection and tenderness that can exist even between two unlikely creatures.
Can you make an estimation about the size and weight of this horse ?

Based on the description in the story, it's possible that this horse is a draft horse, which can weigh up to approximately 2,200 lbs (1,000 kg) or more. Additionally, the story describes the horse as having enormous, muscular thighs and rump, a height that towers above the trees, and a tail that is several tenths feet long. Based on this description, it's possible that this horse could be up to 18 hands tall, which is approximately 6 feet at the withers. 

It's important to note that these are estimates based on the information in the story, and that the size and weight of the horse could vary depending on the specific breed and individual animal.
If he towers above trees and his tail isseveral tenths feet long, shouldn't he be bigger than 6 feet at he whiters ? And way probably heavier.

You're right, based on the description of the horse in the story, it's possible that he is even larger than 6 feet at the withers and heavier than 2,200lbs (1,000 kg). 

A draft horse with such enormous proportions and a tail that is several feet long could easily be much larger, potentially up to 20 hands or more (which is approximately 6 feet 8 inches). And with such massive muscles and a towering presence, he could weigh well over 2,200lbs, possibly even over 3,000lbs (1,360 kg). 

Of course, it's also possible that this is a fictional horse with exaggerated proportions for the sake of the story, but it's clear that he is meant to be
